project_1_description: Developed a Deepfake Image Detector using various Classical ML techniques and CNN Used: SIFT, HOG, LBP techniques. Achieved accuracy of 84%.
project_2_description: Created a Cuisine Recommender System using multiple AI models for prediction Predictions based on previously eaten food items, ingredients, nutritional value etc. Used Content Based Filtering, Collaborative Filtering, KNN, CNN Optimized and measured error with metrics like Mean Squared Error
project_3_description: Developed a user-friendly digital convenience store website using HTML, CSS and JavaScript Implemented backend functionalities using Python and MySQL Connected frontend and backend using Flask
project_4_description: Built a game inspired from the renowned Stick Hero game, infusing it with unique features Designed the project using JavaFX and Scene Builder for a visually appealing interface Used Junit, Serialization for testing, saving progress.
indproj_1_title: Novel Recipe Generator using Large Language Models (LLMs)
indproj_1_description: Built a Novel Recipe Generator using Large Language Models (LLMs). Fine-tuned Hugging Face’s SmolLM language model for the recipe generation. Prepared data by: scraping recipes from Food.com, labelling recipes by cuisine, extracting key details from scraped links, pre-processing the recipes. Created a metric to pinpoint unique ingredients as per cuisine type.
work_1_description: Built an internal infrastructure dashboard using Python and Django, and HTML/CSS, providing real-time insights across global Cadence sites. Automated data collection from remote Linux servers and scheduled tasks for continuous monitoring. Displayed key metrics including resource usage alerts, nightly test results, and test failure-to-owner mappings — enabling teams to streamline debugging and accountability.
